title: veronica latifolia var. urticifolia
intro: Veronica latifolia var. urticifolia, also known as the broad-leaved speedwell, is a plant species in the plantain family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help with wound healing and skin issues. The broad-leaved speedwell is rich in nutrients and antioxidants, providing several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
